meaning: n.礼拜,祭仪,一群信徒,礼拜式
examples: Their son ran away from home and joined a cult.
Sandman's experimentation has made him something of a cult figure on the local music scene.
It gained something of a cult after it was widely circulated on the Internet.
Getting on a horse in Iceland is not like being initiated into an exclusive equine cult.
Wynn has built a strong, cult following for his prolific solo output since the early 90s.
